phases.name: Foundation wiring
phases.focus: Connect handlers to Postgres, real CRUD, SDK methods

tasks.name: Database connectivity
tasks.notes: pgdb + msdb pools wired; catalog (MS reader + enrichments) and classifications adapters done; marketplaces adapter status uncertain

tasks.name: Handler wiring
tasks.notes: Catalog, classifications, pricing handlers fully wired with slog + structured error codes

tasks.name: SDK and frontend
tasks.notes: 11 new SDK methods; ProductPicker; Products, VTEX Publisher, Simulator pages rewritten

tasks.name: Migration runner
subtasks: Implement real migration runner in cmd/migrate/main.go (read SQL files, track applied migrations)

tasks.name: VTEX credential validation endpoint
tasks.notes: POST /connectors/vtex/validate-connection — full hexagonal stack. VTEX account tfcvgo returns 200 in ~762ms. Integration test verified.

tasks.name: Verification
tasks.notes: Server boots clean; 3858 products load; EAN/reference/suggested_price populated; CORS working; frontend at localhost:5173 confirmed live. Remaining pages (Marketplace Settings, Pricing Simulator, VTEX Publisher) not yet smoke-tested.

tasks.name: UX redesign
tasks.notes: PaginatedTable + DetailPanel shared primitives. Full rewrites: ProductsPage (slide-over + classification checkboxes), VTEXPublishPage (sticky config + inline table + Load Classification), PricingSimulatorPage (sticky command bar + inline results). 84/84 tests.

tasks.name: Classifications management page
tasks.notes: New packages/feature-classifications. Two-column layout: list (name, count, delete) + detail (name/ai_context inputs + full product table with checkboxes). Create-on-first-check pattern. /classifications route in sidebar. User created 3 classifications: Ativos (27), Descontinuados (23), Encomenda (19) = 69 products.

phases.name: Pricing simulator
phases.focus: Full simulation engine with frontend UI

tasks.name: Backend
subtasks: Batch simulation: run simulation for all products × all active marketplaces
Simulation history: list past simulations with snapshots
Manual price overrides: CRUD for target prices per product per marketplace
Margin threshold alerts: flag products below minimum margin
Freight calculation: integrate freight cost (initially manual input, later Melhor Envios)

tasks.name: Frontend
subtasks: Pricing simulator page: cross-table (products × marketplaces) with margin cells
Inline price editing for scenario simulation
Health indicators: green (>20%), yellow (10-20%), red (<10%)
Summary KPIs: total products, average margin, critical products count
Export simulation results (CSV)

tasks.name: SDK
subtasks: Add batch simulation method
Add simulation history method
Add manual override methods

phases.name: VTEX connector
phases.focus: Product registration via VTEX API, catalog sync

tasks.name: Connector infrastructure
subtasks: Scheduler infrastructure: cron-style job runner in the server
Job: sync products from VTEX catalog into MPC enrichments

tasks.name: Catalog enhancement
subtasks: Product registration flow: MPC → VTEX API → confirmation
Link MPC product_id to VTEX SKU/product IDs via vtex_entity_mappings

tasks.name: Frontend
subtasks: VTEX Publisher: publish status display (batch progress, per-product step results)
Sync status display (last sync, errors)

phases.name: Messaging + Orders + Alerts
phases.focus: Message centralization, order monitoring, SLA alerts

tasks.name: Messaging module
subtasks: Message entity + polling job (VTEX)
Unified inbox API: list messages, filter by status/marketplace
Reply dispatch + SLA tracking (1h target)

tasks.name: Orders module
subtasks: Order entity + polling job (VTEX)
Order timeline API + SLA tracking (24h dispatch target)

tasks.name: Alerts module
subtasks: Alert rules: SLA breach, margin below threshold
Alert API + frontend badge

tasks.name: Additional connectors
subtasks: Mercado Livre adapter (messages, orders, Q&A)
Magalu adapter (messages, orders, tickets)
Amazon adapter (messages, orders — limited by SP-API)

tasks.name: Unified features
subtasks: Cross-marketplace message inbox
Cross-marketplace order dashboard
Aggregated SLA metrics
